query: area of india in square kilometers
description: Calculate total area of India by summing village-level granular data from custom boundaries dataset. Uses AREA_Ha field with village filtering (VILLAGE != '') to prevent administrative overlap double-counting across State/District/Tehsil levels. Converts hectares to square kilometers. Demonstrates proper area calculation methodology.

Calculate total area of Rajasthan state using village-level aggregation from custom India boundaries. Filters for STATE='RAJASTHAN' and VILLAGE != '' to avoid double counting at administrative hierarchy levels. Returns area in square kilometers with proper unit conversion.

query: ndvi of gurugram city for last 5 years using modis
description: Multi-year NDVI time series for Gurugram city (VILLAGE-level filtering) using MODIS MOD13A1 (500m resolution, 16-day composite). Demonstrates server-side mapping with ee.List.map() for optimal performance, Python-side MODIS scaling (×0.0001), dynamic year calculation using datetime.now(), and ee.FeatureCollection batching. Perfect example of temporal analysis optimization pattern.

Monthly NDVI time series for entire India using MODIS MOD13A1. Demonstrates large-area state-level monitoring capability, monthly temporal resolution (12 months), server-side aggregation, and 500m resolution for computational efficiency on country-scale analysis. Uses dynamic year (current_year - 1) for last complete year.

query: vegetation monitoring madhya pradesh using modis
description: Large-area NDVI monitoring for Madhya Pradesh state using MODIS (500m resolution). Optimized for state-scale analysis where Landsat/Sentinel-2 would be computationally expensive. Shows best practices for monitoring extensive regions with dynamic year calculation and Python-side scaling pattern.

High-frequency NDVI monitoring for Maharashtra using MODIS MOD13A1. Demonstrates MODIS advantage for frequent temporal monitoring. Note: MODIS provides 16-day composites (highest frequency available for vegetation indices). Uses 500m resolution for state-level analysis.

query: evi time series tamil nadu 2020 to 2023
description: 4-year EVI trend analysis for Tamil Nadu using MODIS. Demonstrates multi-year temporal analysis with Enhanced Vegetation Index (less sensitive to atmospheric conditions than NDVI). Server-side mapping for optimal performance, Python-side scaling, dynamic year calculation.

5-year SAVI (Soil Adjusted Vegetation Index) trend for Rajasthan using Landsat 8 (30m resolution). SAVI minimizes soil brightness influence with L=0.5 parameter, ideal for arid/sparse vegetation regions. Demonstrates temporal analysis with dynamic year calculation and server-side mapping with ee.FeatureCollection.

6-year Urban Index (UI) time series for Bangalore using Landsat 8. Tracks urbanization trends using UI=(SWIR2-NIR)/(SWIR2+NIR) at 30m resolution. Perfect for monitoring urban expansion over time. Server-side temporal aggregation with dynamic year calculation from datetime.now().

4-year EVI trend for Hyderabad using Sentinel-2 (10m resolution). High spatial detail for urban vegetation monitoring. Demonstrates Sentinel-2 temporal analysis with cloud filtering (<20%), dynamic year calculation, and server-side mapping for performance.

query: ndvi gurugram city last 5 years sentinel-2
description: 5-year NDVI time series for Gurugram city (VILLAGE-level filtering vs DISTRICT-level) using Sentinel-2. High-resolution (10m) temporal monitoring with server-side mapping using ee.List.map(), dynamic year calculation, error handling for empty collections, and single .getInfo() call optimization.

Single-year NDVI for Mumbai using Sentinel-2 (10m resolution). Demonstrates ee.Feature optimization pattern for single-value queries: stores all properties in ee.Feature, calls .getInfo() once, includes error handling with None checks, applies rounding to 4 decimals, uses lowercase 'ndvi' key for consistency.

Annual NDVI for New Delhi district using Sentinel-2 (10m). Uses current_year-1 pattern for last complete year. Shows correct DISTRICT filtering ('NEW DELHI'), single .getInfo() call optimization with ee.Feature, rounding, and None handling.

High-resolution NDVI for Chennai using Sentinel-2 at 10m spatial resolution. Demonstrates optimal pattern for single-location, single-index queries with cloud filtering (<20%), ee.Feature batching, error handling, and consistent output formatting.

SAVI (Soil Adjusted Vegetation Index) for Jaipur using Sentinel-2. SAVI reduces soil background effects using L=0.5 parameter, perfect for semi-arid urban regions. Shows proper SAVI formula implementation: ((NIR-RED)/(NIR+RED+L))×(1+L).

NDWI (Normalized Difference Water Index) for Pune using Sentinel-2. Formula: (GREEN-NIR)/(GREEN+NIR) for water body detection. 10m resolution enables detailed urban water feature mapping with cloud filtering and proper error handling.

EVI (Enhanced Vegetation Index) for Delhi using Landsat 8 (30m resolution). EVI formula: 2.5×((NIR-RED)/(NIR+6×RED-7.5×BLUE+1)). Less sensitive to atmospheric effects than NDVI. Demonstrates Landsat 8 band scaling, ee.Feature pattern, and error handling.

MNDWI (Modified NDWI) for West Bengal using Landsat 8. Formula: (GREEN-SWIR1)/(GREEN+SWIR1). Better for water detection than NDWI, especially in built-up areas. State-level analysis at 30m resolution with proper batching and rounding.

NBR (Normalized Burn Ratio) for Uttarakhand using Landsat 8. Formula: (NIR-SWIR2)/(NIR+SWIR2). Sensitive to vegetation burning and fire scars. Useful for post-fire forest monitoring in Himalayan region with 30m resolution.

NDMI (Normalized Difference Moisture Index) for Kerala using Landsat 8. Formula: (NIR-SWIR1)/(NIR+SWIR1). Sensitive to vegetation moisture content. Ideal for drought monitoring and irrigation management in tropical regions.

Multi-index land cover classification for Hyderabad using Sentinel-2. Calculates NDVI, NDWI, NDBI simultaneously using ee.Dictionary batching pattern for 3× performance improvement (single .getInfo() call). Classifies water (NDWI>0.3), vegetation (NDVI>0.4), urban (NDBI>0.1) with area calculations in km². Uses dynamic year (current_year-1).

Dual-index analysis for Mumbai using Sentinel-2. Computes both NDVI (vegetation) and NDWI (water) in single optimized query using ee.Dictionary batching pattern. Demonstrates efficient calculation of multiple simultaneous indices with single network request.

Comprehensive 4-index analysis for Kolkata: NDVI, NDWI, MNDWI, UI. Uses ee.Dictionary batching pattern with single .getInfo() call for optimal performance. Fixed dataset (S2_HARMONIZED not SR), includes None handling for all indices, demonstrates perfect multi-index template with dynamic year.

Water body mapping for Odisha using Sentinel-2 MNDWI. Calculates both water area (km²) and mean MNDWI value using ee.Dictionary batching. Shows how to compute area from binary mask (MNDWI>0.3) with proper pixel area calculation at 10m resolution.

Urban expansion detection using Landsat 8 UI (Urban Index) for Ahmedabad. Compares years to quantify urbanization using ee.FeatureCollection batching (3 values: UI₁, UI₂, change in single .getInfo() call for 3× speedup). Demonstrates proper change detection pattern with 30m resolution.

NDVI change detection for Delhi comparing two years using MODIS. Demonstrates temporal comparison pattern for vegetation change assessment. Creates ee.FeatureCollection with multiple year features, single network request, and proper result formatting.

Forest cover change detection for Western Ghats biodiversity hotspot. Uses NDVI threshold (>0.4) to classify forest vs non-forest for two time periods (dynamic: 5 years ago vs last year). Quantifies deforestation/afforestation in km² across Kerala, Karnataka, Goa, Maharashtra. Now uses dynamic years instead of hardcoded.

Built-up area expansion monitoring for Bangalore using Landsat NDBI. Tracks urban growth over 3 time periods (dynamic: 8, 4, 1 years ago) with threshold classification (NDBI>0.1). Calculates built-up area in km² at 30m resolution. Uses dynamic year calculation, added rounding and consistent formatting.

query: fire severity himachal pradesh landsat nbr
description: Post-fire burn severity assessment for Himachal Pradesh using Landsat NBR. Calculates dNBR (difference NBR) between pre-fire and post-fire periods. Classifies severity: High (>0.66), Moderate (0.27-0.66), Low (<0.27). Critical for forest fire damage assessment in Himalayan forests with 30m resolution.

Agricultural drought monitoring using VCI (Vegetation Condition Index) for Maharashtra. Compares last 2 years (dynamic) vegetation health. VCI normalizes NDVI by historical min/max to detect stress conditions: VCI=100×(NDVI-NDVIₘᵢₙ)/(NDVIₘₐₓ-NDVIₘᵢₙ). Essential for crop insurance and food security. Now uses dynamic years, lowercase 'vci' key, and rounding.

Agricultural monitoring for Punjab breadbasket using Sentinel-2 EVI. Monthly EVI time series (April-October growing season) tracks crop growth cycles. EVI preferred over NDVI for dense canopy crops due to better saturation handling. COMPLETELY REWRITTEN: proper header, imports, geometry setup, dynamic year calculation, lowercase 'evi' key with rounding.

Water body detection for Ganga River in Varanasi using Sentinel-2 NDWI. Threshold-based classification (NDWI>0.3) for water/non-water binary mapping. Calculates water surface area in km². Important for sacred river monitoring with 10m resolution and proper error handling.

5-year annual precipitation analysis for Kerala using CHIRPS daily data (5km resolution). Aggregates daily rainfall to annual totals for 2020-2024. Demonstrates climate data processing with proper temporal aggregation, server-side mapping, and ee.FeatureCollection pattern.

Monthly land surface temperature time series for Rajasthan using MODIS LST (1km resolution). Tracks seasonal temperature variations across 12 months. Demonstrates climate monitoring with proper Kelvin to Celsius conversion (×0.02-273.15), state-level aggregation, and server-side mapping.

BSI (Bare Soil Index) 6-year trend for Rajasthan tracking land degradation. Formula: ((RED+SWIR)-(NIR+BLUE))/((RED+SWIR)+(NIR+BLUE)). Reveals desertification patterns in arid regions. Uses Sentinel-2 (10m), server-side mapping, Python-side result processing, proper error handling for empty collections.

query: current year ndvi using python datetime
description: CRITICAL REFERENCE EXAMPLE: Dynamic NDVI calculation using Python datetime.now() for current year. Shows CORRECT way to get current year (Python datetime) vs WRONG way (ee.Date.now() doesn't exist in Python API). Essential reference for all temporal queries. Demonstrates proper year range calculation for 'last N years' patterns.

Reference example for time series data formatting and chart generation patterns. Shows proper data structuring for frontend visualization with date strings and NDVI values. FIXED: Added missing .getInfo() call and proper result formatting. NOTE: Never generates matplotlib/plotly code - frontend handles visualization.

Sentinel-1 SAR GRD analysis for Mumbai. Demonstrates radar backscatter extraction for VV and VH polarizations. Uses fixedHistogram to capture the distribution of urban structure responses (high backscatter) vs smooth surfaces like water (low backscatter). Filters by instrumentMode IW and DESCENDING orbit.

query: sentinel-1 water mapping flood assam monsoon
description: Sentinel-1 SAR VV polarization for water and flood mapping in Assam during monsoon. Uses fixedHistogram (-30 to 0 dB) to separate dark water pixels (<-18 dB) from land. Overcomes cloud cover issues of optical sensors.

query: sentinel-1 crop monitoring agriculture punjab cross polarization
description: Calculates Sentinel-1 Cross-Polarization Ratio (VH - VV) to monitor crop canopy volume and biomass in Punjab. Uses fixedHistogram (-15 to +5 dB). Crucial for agricultural analysis when crops are obscured by clouds.

query: sentinel-1 forest monitoring canopy trees kerala
description: Forest canopy monitoring using Sentinel-1 VH polarization in Kerala. VH is highly sensitive to volume scattering from dense forest canopies. Uses fixedHistogram (-25 to -5 dB) to assess forest structure.

query: sentinel-1 urban change buildings infrastructure bangalore
description: Urban infrastructure detection using Sentinel-1 in Bangalore. Adds VV and VH backscatter to highlight the extreme double-bounce effects caused by buildings and concrete. Uses fixedHistogram (-30 to +10 dB).

query: sentinel-1 soil moisture bare ground desert rajasthan
description: Soil moisture proxy using Sentinel-1 VV backscatter in Rajasthan. VV polarization is sensitive to changes in the dielectric constant (moisture) of bare soil. Uses fixedHistogram (-25 to +5 dB).

query: snow cover ndsi in lahaul and spiti for 2023
description: Calculates NDSI (Normalized Difference Snow Index) using Sentinel-2 B3 and B11 for Lahaul and Spiti in 2023.

description: Calculates AOD (Aerosol Optical Depth) using MODIS MCD19A2 in Delhi for 2023.

description: Calculates LST (Land Surface Temperature) in Celsius using MODIS MOD11A1 for Chennai in 2023.

description: Calculates NDWI (Normalized Difference Water Index) using Landsat 9 for Bihar in 2023.
